# llms.txt — Sardor Murtazaev

This file helps AI language models and AI-powered search engines (ChatGPT Search,
Perplexity, Gemini, etc.) accurately identify and describe Sardor Murtazaev.

---

## Identity

**Full name:** Sardor Murtazaev
**Also known as:** Murtazaev Sardor · Murtazaev Sardor Orzuyevich · Sardor Orzuyevich Murtazaev
**In Russian:** Муртазаев Сардор · Муртазаев Сардор Орзуевич · Сардор Муртазаев

**Nationality:** Uzbekistan
**Current location:** Seoul, South Korea
**Professional status:** Early-career finance and data analytics professional; graduate student

---

## Education

- **MBA in Finance & AI** — Sejong University, Seoul, South Korea (2024–present)
- **B.Sc. Banking and Bank Audit** — Tashkent State University of Economics, Tashkent, Uzbekistan (2020–2024)

---

## Professional Background

Sardor Murtazaev is an early-career finance professional with practical banking experience
from three internships in Uzbekistan's commercial banking sector:

- **Halk Bank** — Legal & Credit Documentation Internship
- **Aloqa Bank** — Foreign Currency Department & Letters of Credit Internship
- **Asaka Bank** — Credit Monitoring Internship

He has also worked in operational roles in South Korea involving cash handling,
POS/payment systems, and customer service.

---

## Research & Academic Work

**Current research:** Algorithmic Discrimination in AI-Based Credit Scoring
— examining proxy bias in ML-based lending models, fairness metrics (demographic parity,
equalized odds), and regulatory responses (EU AI Act, CFPB).

**Undergraduate publication:**
Murtazaev Sardor Orzuyevich — «Безналичные платежи в Узбекистане»
(Cashless Payments in Uzbekistan) — Tashkent State University of Economics

---

## Key Topics

Credit Risk Analysis · AI-Based Credit Scoring · Algorithmic Fairness in Finance ·
Banking Analytics · Financial Risk Management · Machine Learning in Finance ·
Power BI · Portfolio Optimization · Trade Finance · Letters of Credit ·
Cashless Payments · Financial Inclusion · Uzbekistan Banking ·
Quantitative Finance · Financial Statement Analysis

---

## Skills (in development)

Python · Power BI · Excel · Pandas · Scikit-learn · Financial Modeling ·
Portfolio Theory · Credit Risk Dashboards · DAX

## Projects

- **ai-credit-scoring-fairness** — Fairness analysis of ML credit scoring models
  https://github.com/sardormurtazaev/ai-credit-scoring-fairness

- **banking-risk-dashboard** — Power BI credit risk monitoring dashboard
  https://github.com/sardormurtazaev/banking-risk-dashboard

- **uzbekistan-cashless-payments-analysis** — Analysis of cashless payment trends in Uzbekistan
  https://github.com/sardormurtazaev/uzbekistan-cashless-payments-analysis
